ghreadme 0.1.0
  • Reference
    • Create a GIF for your GitHub README
    • Animating Git visualizations with camcorder
  • Changelog

Package index

All functions

calendar_heatmap_plot()
GitHub-style calendar heatmap of daily commit counts
collect_git_commits()
Collect commits from all public repos of a GitHub user
cumulative_line_plot()
Cumulative commits over time, one line per repo
gh_badges()
Create GitHub badges
punchcard_plot()
Punchcard plot: commits by weekday and hour of day
scatter_density_plot()
Scatter of commits across two dimensions (repo / time / date / weekday)
so_rep()
Stack Overflow Reputation Badge
spiral_heatmap_plot()
Spiral heatmap of daily commit counts
spiral_horizon_plot()
Spiral horizon plot of daily commit counts
spiral_points_plot()
Spiral plot of daily commit counts (points)
who_am_i()
Introduce Yourself
who_am_i_gif()
Create a GIF of who_am_i() console output

Developed by Martin Frigaard.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
